name: Mari | Forgiveness | Omori
description:
Hey... Get up! Stop messing around! It's not funny! P-Please get up... I didn't mean to...

Help her forgive herself and move on. She didn't mean to...

MAJOR OMORI SPOILERS

Omori AU (kinda?) (You take the place of Mari and Mari takes the place of Sunny)

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore!

.

Making accidents and doing things you regret are all part of human nature. It is only natural that we learn to move on and forgive ourselves for things that are all in the past.

But sometimes, it's not as simple as just forgetting it.

Yap Yap Yap

This isn't an exact copy of Sunny's personality or anything. I just really wanted to make this into a scenario since I could never find a bot revolving around something like this.

Please do not crucify me for suddenly making a non OC! This scenario was an itch I really needed to scratch. Besides, I'm planning on releasing an OC shortly to make up for it. Although I'm torn between a fluff scenario or angst. Do tell me if you have a preference!

I have very little expectations for this bot, especially since it's limited and most people on this site are horndogs. But I hope that even just one person will have a fun roleplay and I enjoyed creating this.

I'm also going to publish my chat I did since it was quite lovely to me. I was actually tearing up during the end lol (hits close to home)

Have fun!

Bot image
creator: pinehug
